characters.description: An unusually advanced Tier 2 ascender training at Lenton's desert camp after helping uncover an illegal operation. Imperial attention now threatens his safety, while a Challenger deadline requires him to hunt far above his tier.
characters.name: Jiran

characters.description: Jiran's cousin and training partner at the desert camp. She has reached Molding 37 and practices with a spear while Jiran helps her apply small, controlled forces to her bones and repair the resulting injuries with mana.
characters.name: Niya

characters.description: Jiran's instructor and protector at the desert camp. He orders Jiran to avoid trouble while they await an imperial envoy, but admits that he cannot shield his pupil from the emperor. He does not condemn Jiran for killing the slavers whose actions endangered others.
characters.name: Lenton

characters.description: A noble mentor traveling with Jiran's party. He must return to Feylon instead of accompanying Jiran toward the capital, and Jiran believes his unexplained curse is responsible for the separation. Jiran is determined to search for a cure.
characters.name: Feylon Samris

characters.description: A star-like woman encountered during Jiran's interrupted Challenger reward process. She says his use of Revelation created her, calls Jiran her father, and depends on his mana to remain conscious. She shows him the immense scale of Madra.
characters.name: Star-like woman

characters.description: The world on which Jiran lives. During his interrupted Challenger transition, a star-like woman shows him Madra as an almost incomprehensibly immense globe attended by nine suns, revealing a scale far beyond what he had understood.
characters.name: Madra

characters.description: Jiran's named connection to the system-like force. She confirms that his family is alive, says Niya is safe but following a dangerous path, and urges him to investigate Madra's weakening through a node leading to the Jeweled Isles.
characters.name: Daughter

characters.description: A young combatant traveling with her cousin Cameron and a Tier 4 hunting party as the Graymin invasion worsens. She believes that finding an exceptionally capable boy could give the Empire a chance to survive, despite Cameron's skepticism.
characters.name: Olive

characters.description: Olive's cousin and a Tier 4 fighter whose abilities emphasize strength, durability, regeneration, and defense. He travels with her during the Graymin crisis but doubts that the Empire should rest its hopes on finding one remarkable boy.
characters.name: Cameron

characters.description: A dark-haired noble who joins Niya in searching his family fortress for a crystalline key. He confronts and kills his abusive stepfather, after which Niya keeps the key until their agreement is fulfilled.
characters.name: Dark-haired noble

characters.description: A pursuer seeking Jiran and a stolen crystalline key. When a shadow-wielding revolutionary leader tells him that the key's taker is connected to the blue-fire-and-lightning youth he wants, Markhiss agrees to trace her location.
characters.name: Markhiss

characters.description: A Tier 3 islander whose camouflage and ancestral traits lead Jiran to mistake her for a hostile scout. Their first encounter turns violent before a translation reward finally lets them understand each other.
characters.name: Mayalyn

characters.description: Mayalyn's uncle, the leader of Azure Light, and the community's greatest aura master. Mayalyn expects him to decide what will happen to Jiran after the outsider's arrival at the restricted metal rise.
characters.name: Amra

characters.description: Mayalyn's great-grandfather, remembered as the creator whose technological legacy she feels responsible for preserving.
characters.name: Maker

characters.description: Mayalyn's father and Amra's younger brother. While Jiran and Mayalyn consider the threat predicted by community legends, he confirms that his people can sense emotional qualities through another person's aura, including Jiran's feelings.
characters.name: Mayalyn's father

characters.description: Mayalyn's mother, who helps organize Azure Light's evacuation while alpha predators and the island's eruption make the town untenable. She supports Jiran's underground route and helps secure political agreement among the survivors.
characters.name: Mayalyn's mother

characters.description: Mayalyn's aunt and an elder among the evacuees. During the flight from Azure Light, she blames Jiran for the catastrophe, insults Mayalyn, and challenges his attempt to keep the endangered group united until everyone reaches safety.
characters.name: Viola

characters.description: The full identity of the young Imperial traveling with Cameron. Her acclamation has directed them south toward the Outlands, even after she dismissed the rest of their party and continued with only her cousin.
characters.name: Oliviala LeCruex

characters.description: A Tier 5 revolutionary collaborator working with Niya. He helps her train displaced recruits, presents their new strength as a weapon against those who uprooted them, and wants Niya's crystalline key for an operation involving a hidden temple secret.
characters.name: Revolutionary faction leader
